ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_CSH_Validation_Rules__c), IF( AND( MONTH(TODAY()) = 2, DAY(TODAY()) = 29 ), Valid_Until__c > DATE(YEAR(TODAY()) + 1, 3, 1), Valid_Until__c > DATE(YEAR(TODAY()) + 1, MONTH(TODAY()), DAY(TODAY())) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Valid until date should be less than 1 year time span from today
